content:
# Session 21 (review of iter-021) вАФ SectionGradedRing.lean B6-succ effort-breaker

## Metadata
- Global sorry: 9 вЖТ 9. SNAP (`SectionGradedRing.lean`) proof-sorries: 5 вЖТ 5.
- Target: B6-succ `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (effort-breaker decomposition (i)/(ii)/(iii) + co-dispatched prover).
- Build GREEN (2439 jobs). Goal seed `Grassmannian.represents` untouched, DELIVERED.

## What happened вАФ PARTIAL with genuine advance (effort-breaker working as designed)
Per plan-iter-021 (progress-critic `snap-conv-21` = CHURNING; pre-committed gate FIRED вЖТ effort-breaker +
co-dispatched prover). The breaker split B6-succ into 3 `\uses`-linked sub-lemmas:
(i) `вА¶_succ_reindex` [mechanical], (ii) `вА¶_succ_interchange` [whisker_exchange surfaces `ih`],
(iii) `вА¶_succ_coherence` [deep Mac-Lane coherence]. Prover outcome:

- **(i) DELIVERED + axiom-clean.** Three new compiling `private` helpers, all
  `lean_verify` = `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]` (re-confirmed by review):
  - `tensorPowAdd_reindex_fst` (@3079) вАФ first-index reindex of ќЉ; `subst h; simp`.
  - `tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_reindex` (@3092, = blueprint `lem:вА¶_succ_reindex`) вАФ `rw [reindex_fst
    (Nat.succ_add k m')]; rfl`. MECHANICAL, no braided coherence, as the breaker predicted.
  - `tensorPowAdd_succ` (@3066) вАФ definitional succ-clause as a rewrite lemma; `rfl`.
- **Succ case reduced + bridge verified.** `rw [tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_reindex L k m' m'',
  tensorPowAdd_succ L k (m'+m'')]` puts BOTH outer comparisons in explicit succ form; every remaining
  `tensorPowAdd вА¶` is one of the 4 FOLDED inductive atoms (`ќЉ_{k,m'}`, `ќЉ_{k+m',m''}`, `ќЉ_{m',m''}`,
  `ќЉ_{k,m'+m''}`) вАФ exactly what `ih` ties. `ihR := congrArg (¬ЈвЦЈL) ih` + `simp only
  [tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_trans]` constructs the whiskered `ih`. **`lean_goal`-VERIFIED:** ihR 2nd seg
  `WR(ќЉ_{k+m',m''})L` = goal LHS B4 verbatim; ihR 3rd seg `WR(ќЉ_{k,m'+m''})L` = goal RHS D4 verbatim. ihR
  IS the literal bridge.
- **(ii)+(iii) NOT closed вАФ honest inline `sorry` @3261.** The ONLY residual obstruction is goal LHS A4
  `WR(WR(ќЉ_{k,m'}) L)(L^m'')` ( = `(ќЉ вЦЈ L) вЦЈ L^m''` ) vs ihR's first term `WR(WR(ќЉ_{k,m'})(L^m'')) L`
  ( = `(ќЉ вЦЈ L^m'') вЦЈ L` ): differ by transposing the new `L`-factor past `L^m''`; A4 must slide past the
  segment-B2 braiding `ќ≤_{L,L^m''}`. The hom-level `whisker_exchange` crosses the hand-built-whisker /
  `tensorObjIso`-bridge diamond (`analogies/comp-instance-diamond.md`) and did not mechanically discharge
  within budget. Then (iii) = canonical four-letter `hexagon_forward`+`pentagon`, **NO `ќ≤ = id`**.

## Intermediate errors observed (attempts_raw)
- `rw [tensorPowAdd_reindex_fst вА¶]` alone left `unsolved goals` @3092 (the two `eqToIso` reindexers) вЖТ
  fixed by appending `rfl`.
- `lean_goal @3207` timed out (30s) on the pre-build LSP; forced `lake build` (GREEN) then re-queried OK.

## Trajectory note (for the planner)
Sorry-count flat at 5 for iters 017вЖТ021 (5 iters). BUT iter-020 (route-b distribution) and iter-021
((i) closed + exact ih-bridge verified) are genuine structural reductions, not churn вАФ the progress-critic
upgraded STUCKвЖТCHURNING for exactly this reason. The residual is now a single, fully-explicit braided
coherence with the bridge `ihR` in scope. The pre-committed NEXT GATE (plan-iter-021) is a FINE re-break of
(ii)+(iii); see recommendations.md. This is the correct corrective вАФ do NOT re-dispatch a monolith prover
round on the whole succ case.

## Verification (both highly-recommended dispatched вАФ prover touched the file)
- **lean-auditor** `iter021` (CLEAN; 0 critical / 0 major / 1 minor): 3 helpers genuine (not vacuous);
  inline `sorry` @3261 honest, backed by a real `have ihR` construction; NO `maxHeartbeats 1e6` (both
  settings 800000, documented); NO `sorryAx`-laundering; вШЕ/B5/B6-base intact + sorry-free. Minor = the
  `-- PARTIAL:` label in the B6 base-case comment describes only the `simp only` substep (mildly
  confusing, accurate). Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter021.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter021` (B6 chain faithful, no must-fix; 2 major): `tensorPowAdd_assoc`
  statement faithful + not weakened (arbitrary `L`); `lem:вА¶_succ_reindex` one-to-one with prose,
  axiom-clean. **2 major = DANGLING `\lean{}` pins** `lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_interchange` /
  `вА¶succ_coherence` name Lean decls that don't exist (residual is the inline `sorry`); recommendation (a)
  realise as named helpers, fallback (b) collapse to one residual block. Restore list given. Report:
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter021.md`.

## вЪ† sync_leanok over-strip + CORRUPTION (8th consecutive iter) вАФ manual repair
`sync_leanok-state.json` (iter 21, sha 686d776): removed **24**, added **1**, only
`Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`. Confirmed first-hand: **ZERO** proof blocks retained `\leanok` (all 24
closed-proof markers stripped). **5 of them were corrupted to build-breaking dangling LaTeX** вАФ the
`\leanok\uses{` prefix destroyed, leaving `\begin{proof}    <labels>}` (blueprint-doctor: plastex
`RecursionError`, "leanblueprint web crashes; do NOT defer"). **Review REPAIRED all of it** (each decl
mapped via the chapter's `\lean{}`вЖТproof-block structure; вШЕ/B5/`tensorPowAdd_zero_right`/`tensorPowAdd`
spot-confirmed closed; green build + lvbc-faithful establish the closed set):
- **5 corrupted вЖТ `\begin{proof}\leanok\uses{вА¶}`:** L614 (`W_isMonoidal`), L992 (`tensorPowAdd`),
  L1163 (`tensorPowAdd_zero_right`), L1929 (вШЕ `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf`), L1997
  (`tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul`). Resolves ALL the doctor's bare-label/malformed-annotation findings
  for this chapter.
- **20 plain вЖТ `\begin{proof}\leanok`:** L405,657,740,827,860,892,923,952,1132,1353,1591,1623,1650,1723,
  1779,1811,1851,1896,2076,2098 (localization-transport + lax-section + cast lemmas + the new
  `succ_reindex`).
- **9 blocks correctly LEFT bare** (open/sorry/dangling/unscaffolded/mixed): L1235 (`braiding_eq_idвА¶`
  FUTURE), L1299 (`tensorPowAdd_comm` FUTURE), L1390/1427 (interchange/coherence вАФ no Lean decl), L1477
  (`tensorPowAdd_assoc` succ-sorry), L2212 (`sectionMul_coherent` mixed), L2355/2431/2496 (unscaffolded
  gsemiring/gcommSemiring/gmodule).
Post-repair: 25 proof-block `\leanok`, 0 corrupted lines. **Recurring deterministic-tool defect; durable
fix is sync-side** (TO_USER + recommendations).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`: repaired 5 corrupted proof blocks вЖТ `\begin{proof}\leanok\uses{вА¶}`
  (L614/992/1163/1929/1997 вАФ `lean_verify`/closed-set-confirmed axiom-clean; also fixes doctor crash-level
  malformed-annotation findings).
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`: restored 20 plain proof-block `\leanok` (override of sync over-strip;
  lines above; all closed axiom-clean per blockвЖТdecl map + green build + lvbc-faithful verdict).
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_interchange` (L1371) &
  `lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_coherence` (L1408): added `% NOTE (iter-021)` flagging the `\lean{}` pins as
  currently DANGLING (decl not yet created; residual is the inline `sorry`).
- No `\lean{}` renames (prover used the planner's exact names). No `\mathlibok` changes. No stale
  `\notready`. iter-018 `% NOTE` on `lem:tensorProductComm_eq_refl_mathlib` unchanged.

## Coverage debt (dag-query unmatched)
2 new `lean_aux` private helpers with no blueprint entry: `tensorPowAdd_reindex_fst`, `tensorPowAdd_succ`
(both `proved:true, has_sorry:false`). Per SNAP convention private helpers leave the scan with no entry
owed; listed in recommendations for optional restore. (`вА¶_succ_reindex` already has a blueprint block.)

## LOW notes
- lean-auditor minor: B6 base-case `-- PARTIAL:` comment label is sub-step-scoped, mildly stale.
